sections.title: Before and During The Fremennik Trials

lines.speaker: Ingrid Hradson
lines.text: Outlander, I have work to be getting on with... Please stop bothering me.

sections.title: After The Fremennik Trials but before Olaf's Quest

lines.speaker: Ingrid Hradson
lines.text: Good afternoon! How do you like our village?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's lovely. You have a fine collection of goats.

lines.speaker: Ingrid Hradson
lines.text: We polish them every day to get them nice and clean.

lines.speaker: Ingrid Hradson
lines.text: Hello again! Have you any word from my husband?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Err, no, not yet. It takes a while for the messages to reach me, you know.

lines.speaker: Ingrid Hradson
lines.text: Well, when you do, tell him we'll be more than happy to see him again.
